channel.title: The Git Times
channel.description: AI-generated newspaper for builders — daily coverage of trending GitHub projects

item.title: twenty — Building a modern alternative to Salesforce, powered by the community.
item.description: Building a modern alternative to Salesforce, powered by the community.

item.title: colleague-skill — 将冰冷的离别化为温暖的 Skill，欢迎加入数字生命1.0！Transforming cold farewells into warm skills? It's giving rebirth era. Welcome to Digital Life 1.0. 🫶
item.description: 将冰冷的离别化为温暖的 Skill，欢迎加入数字生命1.0！Transforming cold farewells into warm skills? It's giving rebirth era. Welcome to Digital Life 1.0. 🫶

item.title: Codex Plugin Brings OpenAI Reviews to Claude Code — Enables seamless use of Codex commands in existing Claude Code sessions for code analysis
item.description: Enables seamless use of Codex commands in existing Claude Code sessions for code analysis

item.title: Lightweight CLI Proxy Slashes LLM Token Costs for Developers — rtk intelligently compresses terminal command outputs before they reach AI models, delivering major efficiency gains without changing workflows
item.description: rtk intelligently compresses terminal command outputs before they reach AI models, delivering major efficiency gains without changing workflows

item.title: CC Switch Integrates GitHub Copilot in Major Desktop Update — Latest v3.12.3 release delivers reverse proxy support, macOS notarization and unified management for multiple AI coding tools
item.description: Latest v3.12.3 release delivers reverse proxy support, macOS notarization and unified management for multiple AI coding tools

item.title: Open Source AI Dashboard Creates Unified Global Intelligence Monitoring System — World Monitor synthesizes hundreds of news feeds with advanced mapping and local AI for real-time situational awareness
item.description: World Monitor synthesizes hundreds of news feeds with advanced mapping and local AI for real-time situational awareness

item.title: AI Skill Tracks 30-Day Trends Across Social and Tech Platforms — Comprehensive research agent delivers grounded insights from recent online conversations to keep builders informed and competitive
item.description: Comprehensive research agent delivers grounded insights from recent online conversations to keep builders informed and competitive

item.title: Pascal Editor Brings Precision 3D Building Design to the Browser — Sophisticated 2D floorplanning and WebGPU rendering combine in a React-based architecture that redefines web-native architectural modeling
item.description: Sophisticated 2D floorplanning and WebGPU rendering combine in a React-based architecture that redefines web-native architectural modeling

item.title: DeerFlow Orchestrates Sub-Agents for Complex Research and Coding Tasks — Open-source super agent platform leverages memory sandboxes and skills to automate sophisticated developer workflows across extended time horizons
item.description: Open-source super agent platform leverages memory sandboxes and skills to automate sophisticated developer workflows across extended time horizons

item.title: MoneyPrinterV2 Automates Online Income Generation Through Smart Tools — This modular Python application brings together social media bots, video automation, affiliate systems and targeted outreach in an easy-to-deploy package.
item.description: This modular Python application brings together social media bots, video automation, affiliate systems and targeted outreach in an easy-to-deploy package.

item.title: OpenViking Applies Filesystem Model to AI Agent Context — New context database unifies memory, resources and skills in a hierarchical structure, giving agents an observable and evolvable knowledge layer.
item.description: New context database unifies memory, resources and skills in a hierarchical structure, giving agents an observable and evolvable knowledge layer.

item.title: Offline AI Knowledge System Prepares Users for Disconnected Worlds — Project N.O.M.A.D. combines local artificial intelligence with comprehensive archives and tools in a fully offline package for ultimate resilience
item.description: Project N.O.M.A.D. combines local artificial intelligence with comprehensive archives and tools in a fully offline package for ultimate resilience

item.title: Mole V1.30 Supercharges Mac Cleanup with Edge-Case Hardening — Latest release refines orphan detection, stabilizes scans, and boosts reliability for power users reclaiming disk space amid growing builds.
item.description: Latest release refines orphan detection, stabilizes scans, and boosts reliability for power users reclaiming disk space amid growing builds.

item.title: Everything Claude Code Supercharges AI Coding Agents into Production Beasts — Hackathon-winning harness turns raw Claude tools into optimized systems with skills, memory persistence, and security for real-world dev workflows.
item.description: Hackathon-winning harness turns raw Claude tools into optimized systems with skills, memory persistence, and security for real-world dev workflows.

item.title: AIRI's Alpha Release Polishes Game-Playing AI Companions for Everyday Use — v0.9.0-alpha.16 adds permissions flows, profile switchers, and Minecraft security to push self-hosted waifus closer to Neuro-sama's interactivity.
item.description: v0.9.0-alpha.16 adds permissions flows, profile switchers, and Minecraft security to push self-hosted waifus closer to Neuro-sama's interactivity.

item.title: Superpowers Framework Turns AI Coding Agents into Methodical Engineers — Composable skills enforce spec approval, TDD planning, and subagent execution for reliable autonomous development.
item.description: Composable skills enforce spec approval, TDD planning, and subagent execution for reliable autonomous development.

item.title: Attention Residuals Let Transformers Selectively Tap Deeper Layer Wisdom — MoonshotAI's AttnRes swaps uniform residuals for smart attention over prior outputs, fixing dilution in massive models
item.description: MoonshotAI's AttnRes swaps uniform residuals for smart attention over prior outputs, fixing dilution in massive models

item.title: Lightpanda Delivers Zig-Built Headless Browser for Lightning-Fast AI Automation — Ultra-low memory and 11x Chrome speed make it ideal for scaling web scraping, agent tasks, and testing workflows
item.description: Ultra-low memory and 11x Chrome speed make it ideal for scaling web scraping, agent tasks, and testing workflows

item.title: Lightpanda: Zig-Powered Headless Browser Turbocharges AI Automation — Ultra-lean alternative to Chrome slashes memory by 9x and boosts speed 11x for scraping, testing, and intelligent agents
item.description: Ultra-lean alternative to Chrome slashes memory by 9x and boosts speed 11x for scraping, testing, and intelligent agents

item.title: gstack Turns Claude into a Slash-Command Dev Team for Solo Builders — Garry Tan's toolkit deploys specialized AI roles—from CEO planner to QA engineer—to fix generic agents' blind spots in real projects.
item.description: Garry Tan's toolkit deploys specialized AI roles—from CEO planner to QA engineer—to fix generic agents' blind spots in real projects.
